answer:
The subject "Hey" appears in two distinct email threads. In one thread between Mark Guzman and Kate Symes, Mark forwarded an email discussing being locked out of his house and feeling unwell after two nights of binge drinking, noting Kate stayed up partying until 6 AM. He also vaguely remembered making a deal on tickets [msg: <13353987.1075840740413.JavaMail.evans@thyme>, msg: <23747003.1075840623956.JavaMail.evans@thyme>, msg: <5589744.1075840646024.JavaMail.evans@thyme>].

In another thread, Robin Rodrigue and Becky Pitre discussed soreness and a "rough day" after playing five games, with Robin mentioning sliding twice and getting a "raspberry on my calf" from what she referred to as softball [msg: <6096979.1075858383681.JavaMail.evans@thyme>, msg: <15284597.1075858340123.JavaMail.evans@thyme>].
